creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

The latest patch fails to install during my tests like that:

http://pd.valinor.palantiri.org/data/11amd64-default/2014-12-08_21h00m06s/logs/errors/ruby-build-20141128.log

After some inspection, it seems like the current GH_COMMIT=ae0f2b9 should be something like GH_COMMIT=5456928 instead. Could you please look into it and send updated and tested patch?

Kind regards,
Bartek Rutkowski
